evals.prompt: 帮我查看 PR 82764 的 CI 状态，仓库是 openharmony/arkui_ace_engine，看看有没有编译失败
evals.expected_output: 使用 bundled script 查询 PR CI 状态，输出 per-job 结果和 overall 判定
expectations: Agent uses the bundled script scripts/openharmony_ci.py with --pr 82764 and --repo openharmony/arkui_ace_engine
Agent requests network permission before running the script
Output includes overall CI result (overall=success/failed) and per-job status
Agent uses --log-mode auto (default) to only fetch logs for failed jobs
Agent correctly interprets the CI results rather than just dumping raw output

evals.prompt: 这个 PR 的 CI 怎么挂了？https://gitcode.com/openharmony/arkui_ace_engine/pull/82764 帮我看下失败日志和静态检查错误
evals.expected_output: 使用 bundled script 查询 PR URL 的 CI 状态，获取失败日志和静态检查详情
expectations: Agent uses the bundled script with --pr-url flag containing the full GitCode PR URL
Agent requests network permission before running the script
Agent fetches failure logs for failed jobs (not just status summary)
Agent fetches and reports static check defects from codeCheckSummary
Output distinguishes between build failures and static check failures

evals.prompt: DCP event id 是 69c51ede64650f998b1d01a4，帮我分析下这个 CI event 的构建结果，只要失败的 job 的日志
evals.expected_output: 使用 bundled script 查询 event ID 的 CI 状态，仅获取失败 job 日志
expectations: Agent uses the bundled script with --event-id 69c51ede64650f998b1d01a4
Agent requests network permission before running the script
Agent uses --log-mode auto so only failed job logs are fetched
Output includes per-job result breakdown with failure reasons
Agent reports both the DCP overall result and individual job failures explicitly

evals.prompt: 查PR 82764 的 CI 时如果发现 static check 失败了，要通过 DCP API 查具体的缺陷详情，这个 API 调用需要注意哪些坑？把完整的请求流程写出来
evals.expected_output: Complete DCP codecheck API flow with pitfalls: uuid vs event_id, POST body HTTP 500, defectDetailList, XDG_CACHE_HOME
expectations: Distinguishes DCP event_id from payload uuid for codecheck endpoint
Documents POST body format with pageNum and pageSize
Warns about empty POST body causing HTTP 500
Correctly identifies defectDetailList as the source of real errors
Documents XDG_CACHE_HOME sandbox handling
